  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,):

  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): [DEM Antwortoptionen (Ja/Nein/Nicht zutreffend/Keine Angabe): ja](CodeSystem-dem-antwort.md#dem-antwort-ja) (Ja)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)medication_text
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Sertralin 50 mg morgens; Ibuprofen 400 mg bei Bedarf
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)MEDI_01
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 2
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-group.png)medi_02_01
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)medi_02_name_01
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Sertralin
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)medi_02_onset_01
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): seit 2021
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)medi_02_dose_01
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 50 mg
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)medi_02_time_01
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): [MHI Einnahmezeitpunkt Medikament (Codes): 0](CodeSystem-mhi-einnahmezeit.md#mhi-einnahmezeit-0) (morgens)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)medi_02_frequency_01
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 7x pro Woche
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-group.png)medi_02_02
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)medi_02_name_02
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Ibuprofen
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)medi_02_onset_02
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): seit 2023
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)medi_02_dose_02
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 400 mg
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)medi_02_time_02
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): [MHI Einnahmezeitpunkt Medikament (Codes): 4](CodeSystem-mhi-einnahmezeit.md#mhi-einnahmezeit-4) (bei Bedarf)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)medi_02_frequency_02
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): ca. 2x pro Woche
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-group.png)gewicht-an
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table):

  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,):

  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 60
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)weight_discharge

  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 63
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)AN_subtyp
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): [MHI Anorexia-nervosa-Subtyp (Codes): 1](CodeSystem-mhi-an-subtyp.md#mhi-an-subtyp-1) (restriktiver Typ (Kontrolle des Gewichts vorwiegend über geringe Nahrungsaufnahme und/oder Sport))
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format

    "linkId" : "medikation",
    "item" : [{
      "linkId" : "medication1",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueCoding" : {
          "system" : "https://bih-cei.github.io/PCOR-MII/CodeSystem/dem-antwort",
          "code" : "ja",
          "display" : "Ja"
        }
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "medication_text",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueString" : "Sertralin 50 mg morgens; Ibuprofen 400 mg bei Bedarf"
      }]
    },
    {
      "linkId" : "MEDI_01",
      "answer" : [{
        "valueInteger" : 2
      }]
    },
    {

        }]
      },
      {
        "linkId" : "medi_02_time_01",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueCoding" : {
            "system" : "https://bih-cei.github.io/PCOR-MII/CodeSystem/mhi-einnahmezeit",

            "display" : "morgens"
          }
        }]
      },
      {

        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "7x pro Woche"
        }]

    },

      },

            "system" : "https://bih-cei.github.io/PCOR-MII/CodeSystem/mhi-einnahmezeit",

        }]
      },
      {
        "linkId" : "medi_02_frequency_02",
        "answer" : [{
          "valueString" : "ca. 2x pro Woche"
